name: whiteboard.annotate
description: Add an agent-authored text annotation to a whiteboard canvas. Annotations are visually badged (🧠) to distinguish agent contributions from human ones. Useful for adding AI-generated insights, summaries, or suggestions directly to the board.

room_id.description: Whiteboard room ID to annotate (optional, uses session)

color.description: Annotation color (e.g. 'violet', 'blue', 'yellow'). Defaults to 'violet' for agent annotations.

x.description: Optional X position on canvas. Auto-positioned if omitted.

y.description: Optional Y position on canvas. Auto-positioned if omitted.

project_id.description: Project ID for scoping (optional, uses session)

org_id.description: Organization ID for multi-tenant context (optional, uses session)
